exploration_notes: Found all six requested files in layout/style/. ServoStyleSet (header at line 107, .cpp includes RestyleManager and ServoBindings) is the main entry point for style resolution. ServoBindings.h declares the Gecko-to-Servo FFI via extern "C" functions generated by macros (BASIC_RULE_FUNCS_*, GROUP_RULE_FUNCS_*), with key pattern Servo_StyleSet_*RuleChanged. RestyleManager.h declares class RestyleManager (line 202) and the helper ServoRestyleState (line 43) for scheduling and managing style recalcu
